---
title: "Corruption Index"
editor: visual
---

# Corruptions Perception Index - Transperancy International

```{r}
options(scipen = 999)

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(flextable)
library(tidyr)
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## 2025

Below is a bar graph which each nations corruption index score followed by their rank in parenthesis.\

```{r}
# Import Dataframe from Corruption Index
corruption_index <- read_excel("CPI2025_Results.xlsx", skip = 2)
corruption_index <- corruption_index %>% 
  select(`Country / Territory`, `CPI 2025 score`, Rank) %>% 
  mutate(Country = `Country / Territory`,
         Score = `CPI 2025 score`) %>%
  filter(Country %in% c('Ghana', 
                    'Nigeria',
                    "Cote d'Ivoire",
                    'Senegal',
                    'Cameroon',
                    'Togo',
                    'Sierra Leone',
                    'Liberia',
                    'United States of America')) %>% 
  select(-`Country / Territory`, -`CPI 2025 score`) %>% 
  mutate(Country = ifelse(Country == "United States of America", "United States", Country),
         Country = ifelse(Country == "Cote d'Ivoire", "Côte d'Ivoire", Country))

```

```{r}
# Graph for Corruption Index
corruption_index %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = Score,
    y = reorder(Country, Score)
  )) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7B83EB") +
  
  # ✅ Label: Score (Rank)
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(Score, 1), " (", Rank, ")")),
            hjust = -0.1,
            color = "#7B83EB",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 10)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 105)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Corruption Perceptions Index (2025)",
    x = "Score",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```

## Timeseries

```{r}
CPI2025_Results <- read_excel("CPI2025_Results.xlsx", 
    sheet = "CPI Timeseries 2012 - 2025", 
    skip = 2)

corruption_time <- clean_names(CPI2025_Results)

corruption_time <- corruption_time %>% 
  
  select(country_territory ,cpi_score_2025, cpi_score_2024, cpi_score_2023 ,cpi_score_2022, cpi_score_2021, cpi_score_2021, cpi_score_2020, cpi_score_2019, cpi_score_2018, cpi_score_2017, cpi_score_2016, cpi_score_2015, cpi_score_2014, cpi_score_2013, cpi_score_2012) %>% 
  
  filter(country_territory %in% c('Ghana', 
                    'Nigeria',
                    "Cote d'Ivoire",
                    'Senegal',
                    'Cameroon',
                    'Togo',
                    'Sierra Leone',
                    'Liberia',
                    'United States of America')) %>% 
  mutate(country_territory = ifelse(country_territory == "United States of America", "United States", country_territory),
         country_territory = ifelse(country_territory == "Cote d'Ivoire", "Côte d'Ivoire", country_territory))
```

```{r}
corruption_time_long <- corruption_time %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("cpi_score"),
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(gsub("cpi_score_", "", year)))

ggplot(corruption_time_long, aes(x = year, y = score, color = country_territory, group = country_territory)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2012, 2025, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Corruption Perceptions Index Over Time (2012-2025)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "CPI Score",
    color = "Country"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
```{r}
plot_corruption <- function(country_name, data) {
  
  data %>%
    filter(country_territory == country_name) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = starts_with("cpi_score"),
      names_to = "year",
      values_to = "score"
    ) %>%
    mutate(year = as.numeric(gsub("cpi_score_", "", year))) %>%
    
    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = score)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "#7B83EB") +
    geom_point(size = 2, color = "#7B83EB") +
    
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2012, 2025, 1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
    
    labs(
      title = paste("Corruption Perceptions Index -", country_name),
      x = "Year",
      y = "CPI Score"
    ) +
    
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    )
}
```

```{r}
plot_corruption("Ghana", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("Nigeria", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("Côte d'Ivoire", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("Senegal", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("Cameroon", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("Togo", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("Sierra Leone", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("Liberia", corruption_time)
plot_corruption("United States", corruption_time)
```

:::
